summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SecureImage Forge Phase 1-4 features plus Granular Runtime & OS Controls (Phase 4.5). All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including EnhancedNewBuild component with Simple/Advanced toggle, runtime version/distribution selectors, CIS level selection, binary whitelist, env sanitization, custom labels, and SBOM configuration.

issues: Console warning about span inside option element in base image tag selector - minor React hydration warning, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Phase 4 services (opa_engine.py, slsa_attestor.py, vex_generator.py, drift_detector.py) are MOCKED with hardcoded data as noted in the request
Docker image building is simulated - not actual Docker builds
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Created test builds with TEST_ prefix during testing: TEST_simple_build, TEST_advanced_build, TEST_get_build, TEST_completion_flow, UI_TEST_advanced_build
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 1-4 features plus Phase 4.5 Granular Controls are working. Backend APIs tested: /api/runtime-versions, /api/base-image-tags, /api/cis-levels, /api/sbom-formats, /api/builds (with advanced config), /api/validate-runtime-config, /api/policies, /api/analytics/*. Frontend tested: Dashboard, EnhancedNewBuild (Simple/Advanced modes), BuildsList, Analytics, Policies pages. Build submission with advanced config redirects correctly to build details page.

features_tested.dashboard: PASS - loads with stats and recent builds
features_tested.enhanced_new_build_simple_mode: PASS - renders with all basic controls
features_tested.enhanced_new_build_advanced_mode: PASS - shows runtime version/distribution selectors, base image tag selector, CIS level selector, binary whitelist, env sanitization, custom labels, SBOM config
features_tested.runtime_versions_api: PASS - returns version matrix for java, dotnet, go, nodejs
features_tested.base_image_tags_api: PASS - returns tag catalog for alpine, debian, distroless
features_tested.cis_levels_api: PASS - returns level1 and level2 configurations
features_tested.sbom_formats_api: PASS - returns cyclonedx, spdx formats and scan depths
features_tested.build_submission_advanced: PASS - accepts advanced config payload and redirects to build details
features_tested.builds_list_page: PASS - shows list with filters and search
features_tested.policies_page: PASS - displays policies and add from template modal

mocked_services_note: Phase 4 services (OPA, SLSA, VEX, Drift Detection) and Docker/Trivy/Cosign integrations are MOCKED as documented
